cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13)

# Standalone Asio — header-only, Boost Software License 1.0.
# This project downloads the Asio headers and installs:
#   - headers  → <prefix>/include/
#   - cmake    → <prefix>/lib/cmake/asio/asio-config.cmake
#
# The resulting asio::asio INTERFACE target provides:
#   INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES pointing at <prefix>/include
#   INTERFACE_COMPILE_DEFINITIONS ASIO_STANDALONE

project(external-asio)

include(ExternalProject)

set(ASIO_GIT_TAG "asio-1-30-2")

# Write the cmake config file to a known location so we can install it.
set(ASIO_CONFIG_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/cmake")
file(MAKE_DIRECTORY "${ASIO_CONFIG_DIR}")

file(WRITE "${ASIO_CONFIG_DIR}/asio-config.cmake" [=[
# asio-config.cmake — generated by MAVSDK superbuild
if(TARGET asio::asio)
    return()
endif()

get_filename_component(_ASIO_CMAKE_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_FILE}" PATH)
get_filename_component(_ASIO_INCLUDE_DIR "${_ASIO_CMAKE_DIR}/../../../include" ABSOLUTE)

add_library(asio::asio INTERFACE IMPORTED)
set_target_properties(asio::asio PROPERTIES
    INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES "${_ASIO_INCLUDE_DIR}"
    INTERFACE_COMPILE_DEFINITIONS "ASIO_STANDALONE"
)

if(WIN32)
    set_property(TARGET asio::asio APPEND PROPERTY
        INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES ws2_32 mswsock)
endif()
]=])

ExternalProject_Add(
    asio
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/chriskohlhoff/asio.git
    GIT_TAG        ${ASIO_GIT_TAG}
    GIT_SHALLOW    TRUE
    CONFIGURE_COMMAND ""
    BUILD_COMMAND ""
    INSTALL_COMMAND
        ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_directory
            <SOURCE_DIR>/asio/include
            ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/include
        COMMAND
        ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E make_directory
            ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/lib/cmake/asio
        COMMAND
        ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy
            ${ASIO_CONFIG_DIR}/asio-config.cmake
            ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/lib/cmake/asio/asio-config.cmake
)
